text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I was so close yesterday! If I'd gone just a liiittle bit faster, I would've passed the racer in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've got a plan! Today I'm gonna learn how
to get faster!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bouncy-bouncy! McQueen! Let's have a race,
kangaroo-style!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But kangaroos are even faster than Umamusume!
Isn't that crazy?! Come on, we gotta try it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I feel like a broken record at this point, but I'm telling you... I still have no clue what you're talking about!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What? Are kangaroos really that fast?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, a neuron fires in Haru Urara's
brain!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Aha! If I act like a kangaroo, I'll become super
fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pictures of kangaroos fill her mind.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! I got it now! I'll become a kangaroo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I feel faster already! I think!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the speed of a kangaroo, it seems Haru
Urara has made a delightful discovery within
herself.
